vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. All registered plant life has been removed or has suffered total senescence/necrosis.
anomalies: Removal of the electronic component (IC chip) from the desk surface between T-2 and T-1.
Total disappearance of the Pothos specimen (P3) observed in the early sequence.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a transition from a populated botanical desk to a sterile, empty state. The sequence begins with a single, struggling specimen in the black pot (P3) and a white rabbit anchor. Over the course of the observation, the desk is cleared of both the plant life and the incidental electronic debris. By the current timestamp, the biome is entirely devoid of vegetation, rendering the registry obsolete.
